response.justification: Bogdan is an accomplished polyglot engineer with strong TypeScript/Node.js and full-stack credentials, but the role demands deep Java and Kotlin expertise, JVM internals knowledge, and hands-on experience with Spring/Quarkus/Hibernate — none of which appear meaningfully in his history. His closest IDE-adjacent work (NI LabWindows) was a six-month C/C++ role over a decade ago. Developer tooling interest is evident, but it is entirely in the web/scripting ecosystem, not the JVM enterprise space this position requires.
strengths: Demonstrated interest in building developer tooling (MCP code generators, test runners, CI/CD infrastructure)
Strong software craftsmanship ethos — consistent application of TDD, clean architecture, and DX focus across roles
Polyglot background with some Java exposure and prior work on a C-based IDE product (NI LabWindows/CVI)
concerns: Primary production stack is TypeScript/Node.js; no evidence of substantive Java or Kotlin engineering at scale
No mention of Spring, Quarkus, Hibernate, or any JVM enterprise framework in work history or skills
No experience with IDE internals, language tooling, or JVM build systems (Gradle, Maven, etc.)

key_factors.factor: No Spring or enterprise framework experience
